data.title: Cat's♥Eye
data.synopsis: The protagonists of the series are the three Kisugi sisters—Hitomi, Rui and Ai—who run a café called Cat's Eye. The sisters lead a double life as a trio of highly skilled art thieves, leaving cards with the name "Cat's Eye" at the scene of their crimes. They steal works of art that belonged to their long-missing father, Heinz who was a famous art collector during the Nazi regime, in the hopes of him contacting them. Toshio, the police officer investigating this case is the fiancé of Hitomi. He also swears to capture and bring down the Cat's Eye Gang.

titles.title: Disney Twisted-Wonderland The Animation: Episode of Savanaclaw
ディズニー ツイステッドワンダーランド ザ アニメーション エピソード オブ サバナクロー

data.title: Disney Twisted-Wonderland The Animation: Episode of Savanaclaw
data.title_japanese: ディズニー ツイステッドワンダーランド ザ アニメーション エピソード オブ サバナクロー
data.synopsis:
One day, high school student Yuuka "Yuu" Hirasaka finds herself transported to the world of Twisted Wonderland after a black carriage crashes into her. Though she hopes to return home to Tochigi in Japan, the magicless judo practitioner ends up enrolling in the prestigious magic academy Night Raven College.

As Yuu acclimates to her new life, the annual interdorm Spelldrive tournament at the school is set to begin. The team-based game tests the physical and magical strength of each dorm's seven best athletes, all while being broadcast throughout the magical world. For the past two years, the Diasomnia dorm has crushed the competition thanks solely to their powerful housewarden, Malleus Draconia.

Amidst the excitement, a series of incidents across campus befalling the top Spelldrive players from all dorms is rendering them unable to compete. Concerned that these are no mere accidents, the headmage of the academy tasks Yuu and her dormmate Grim to investigate. While the pair dives deeper into the matter, one housewarden in particular is determined to defeat Diasomnia—even if he must use underhanded methods to do so.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Disney Twisted-Wonderland The Animation: Episode of Octavinelle
ディズニー ツイステッドワンダーランド ザ アニメーション エピソード オブ オクタヴィネル

data.title: Disney Twisted-Wonderland The Animation: Episode of Octavinelle
data.title_japanese: ディズニー ツイステッドワンダーランド ザ アニメーション エピソード オブ オクタヴィネル
data.synopsis:
Three months ago, Yuuta "Yuu" Mito was a part-time worker at a Chinese restaurant in Wakayama, Japan. Now, the teenager has been stranded in the magical realm of Twisted Wonderland after a black horse-drawn carriage ran into him while he was delivering a customer's order. Unable to return to his original world, the magicless Yuu found himself enrolled at the prestigious Night Raven College in the meantime.

A strange happening around the campus emerges following the exam season, with several students sprouting sea anemones from the top of their heads—including Yuu's friends Grim, Ace Trappola, and Deuce Spade. Matters only worsen when those affected are told that they have become indentured servants to Octavinelle's housewarden, Azul Ashengrotto, as a result of magical contracts they had previously signed with him.

Unaffected since he never entered a deal with Azul, Yuu must find a way to break the contracts and save his friends. But completing this task without any magic of his own may prove more daunting than he realizes, as the odds begin to stack against him.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: イクイク サキュバス再教育

data.title: Ikuiku Succubus Saikyouiku
data.title_japanese: イクイク サキュバス再教育
data.synopsis: Being an experienced teacher, Busujima fills students' heads with high-quality knowledge. One day, exchange students from the succubus kingdom come to study with him. These insidious and ugly creatures completely refuse to learn, and the quiet life of a man is turned upside down. But he wouldn't be called Busujima for nothing. Raised according to samurai traditions, he intends to walk his path to the very end and fulfill his teaching duty – to drum into the disobedient succubi the desire to learn, one way or another.

This is an animation made to promote the video game Custom Robo (1999, Nintendo 64). This video was given away as a gift to readers of Shogakukan's manga magazine, Korokoro Comic.

data.title: Onaka ga Guuguu Island
data.title_japanese: おなかがぐ〜ぐ〜アイランド
data.synopsis:
This is Guuguu Island, a magical island where the Yakiniku King menu items live. Meat, vegetables, mulberries, sweets... there's all kinds of delicious food! Calvin the apprentice galbi has a dream to become "Yakiniku King's most popular menu item"! To achieve that, he is happily flying around the universe with his adorable friends. Will Calvin and his friends be able to become Yakiniku King's most popular menu items? Aim for a delicious serving! Aim for a delicious Yakiniku King!

(Source: YouTube, translated)

titles.title: You and I Are Polar Opposites

data.title: Seihantai na Kimi to Boku
data.title_english: You and I Are Polar Opposites
data.synopsis:
Miyu Suzuki is a high school girl whose cheerful outlook on life is tempered by her need to fit in. Coincidentally, beside her in the classroom sits Yuusuke Tani, a boy unconcerned with others' expectations. Their exchanges rarely extend beyond brief discourse, yet the polarity of their demeanors unexpectedly draws them to one another.

As their mutual interest grows, the newfound feelings are no longer easy to ignore. Eventually, Suzuki voices what is inside her heart, forcing both of them to confront the unspoken affection between them. With each passing moment, their relationship evolves, and they gradually come to better understand themselves and the person who is their polar opposite.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Nazotoki wa Dinner no Ato de
謎解きはディナーのあとで

data.title: Nazotoki wa Dinner no Ato de
data.title_japanese: 謎解きはディナーのあとで
data.synopsis:
Reiko Houshou, heiress to a large conglomerate, seems like any other wealthy lady. However, not many people know that she is a rookie detective for the Kunitachi Police Department. In addition, she hides her identity from her incompetent boss, Kyouichirou Kazamatsuri, a flashy heir to his family's motor business.

During an investigation involving her college friends, Reiko has trouble identifying the culprit and their motive. Out of nowhere, a man approaches Reiko and introduces himself as Kageyama, her newly assigned butler. As soon as Reiko confides in him about her worries, he criticizes her lack of deduction skills and helps her quickly crack the case. Now with the sharp-tongued Kageyama at her side, Reiko may just become the detective she desires to be.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Nazotoki wa Dinner no Ato de aired on Fuji TV's noitaminA block.

data.title: Shabake
data.synopsis:
In the Edo period, Ichitarou, the young heir to a large apothecary shop, has always been stuck in his room due to his weak constitution. As unpleasant rumors about his condition surround him, his grandfather prays for a god to send spirits that will protect the sickly boy. These two guardians, Sasuke and Nikichi, will remain by Ichitarou's side for life and safeguard his health.

As years pass, Ichitarou leaves his room more often, wanting to be helpful and ignoring those who insist that he keep resting instead. One day, Ichitarou sneaks outside without his guardians and ends up staying out until nightfall. On his way home, a bloody man suddenly begins chasing him! The quick-witted Ichitarou is able to escape and discovers the brutal murder scene.

The next day, Ichitarou hears about the murder, but there is something odd about the story—the victim had a different mortal wound from what he saw. With the murderer still at large, Ichitarou continues to gather more details about the peculiar case from humans and spirits alike, which might just lead him to unravel the mystery.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Shabake aired on Fuji TV's noitaminA block. The series was released on Blu-ray and DVD in three volumes from December 17, 2025, to February 18, 2026.
